headline: Kaley SLAMS Zuck & YouTube рҹ’Ҙрҹ“ұ $6M Addiction ORGY Verdict! рҹҳ©рҹ’ё
text:
LA JURY рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ–пёҸрҹ”Ҙ just DROPPED the HAMMER рҹ”Ё on META ZUCK рҹӨ–рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј and GOOGLE YOUTUBE рҹҺҘрҹ“ә for turning KALEY рҹ‘§рҹҳў into a SCROLL-ZOMBIE рҹ§ҹвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ“ұ from age SIX рҹҚјрҹҡҖ! $6M FAT STACK рҹ’°рҹҚ‘ вҖ“ $3M compensatory рҹҳӯрҹ’” + $3M PUNITIVE SLAP рҹ‘ӢрҹҳҲ cuz these corps acted with MALICE рҹҰ№вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ FRAUD рҹӨ‘ and OPPRESSION рҹҳЎ вҖ“ Zuck's IG рҹҢҲрҹ“ё & YT infinite scroll BRRRRR рҹ’Ёрҹ”„ built like CRACK MACHINES рҹҚҶрҹ’ү hooking kids EARLY AF! Meta eats 70% рҹҘ§рҹ“ү, Google chokes 30% рҹӨ® вҖ“ parents outside COURTHOUSE рҹҺүрҹӨ— HUGGING like they WON the LOTTO рҹӨ‘рҹҺ° after 5-WEEK SIZZLE рҹ”Ҙ!

Zuck рҹ•¶пёҸрҹҳҸ testified 'TEENS рҹ§’ complex AF, not OUR FAULT one app' рҹӨЎрҹ’… but JURY called CAP рҹҡ« вҖ“ internal docs SPILL вҳ• that Meta KNEW kiddos under 13 SLIPPING IN рҹ‘»рҹҡӘ like ghosts at a rave рҹ‘»рҹҺү! 'Wished for faster progress' рҹҳ©рҹӣҢ Zuck SIMPS, but lawyers ROASTED: growth GOALS рҹ”қ targeted YOUNG MEAT рҹҘ©рҹ‘¶ cuz they STICK like GLUE рҹӣ пёҸрҹ“ұ for LIFETIME ADDICTION рҹ’Җ! Kaley SPILLS TEA вҳ•: started IG at NINE рҹҳұ, YT at SIX рҹҚј, NO BLOCKS рҹҡ« вҖ“ ditched fam рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§рҹҳў for 16HR MARATHONS рҹҸғвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ’Ё, anxiety/depression HIT at 10 рҹҳ°рҹ§ , body dysmorphia from FILTERS рҹ“ёвңЁ making nose TINY рҹ‘ғвһЎпёҸрҹ§ҷ & eyes BDE BIG рҹҚҶрҹ‘Җ!

Adam Mosseri IG HEAD рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹ“ұ denies ADDICTION рҹҡ«рҹҳӨ, calls 16HR 'PROBLEMATIC' рҹҳӮрҹӨЎ вҖ“ bro, that's ZUCKER-BINGE MODE рҹҚ”рҹ“ұ! Snap & TikTok COPPED OUT рҹ’ёрҹӨқ with secret SETTLEMENTS рҹӨ‘ pre-trial, cowards рҹҗ”! NM JURY day before ROASTED Meta for SEX PREDATOR EXPOSURE рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҚҶрҹҡ« & kid ENDANGERMENT рҹҳұ вҖ“ BACK-TO-BACK SMACKDOWNS рҹ’Ҙрҹ‘Ҡ signal BREAKING POINT рҹҡЁ with BIG TECH DADDIES рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’јрҹ’°!

Forrester Mike Proulx рҹ“Ҡрҹ”Ҙ: 'NEGATIVE VIBES BOILING OVER рҹҢӢрҹҳЎ after YEARS of SIMPING social media!' Aussies рҹҮҰрҹҮә BANNING kids рҹ“ө, UK piloting UNDER-16 LOCKOUT рҹ”’рҹӣ‘ вҖ“ WORLD WAKING UP вҳ•рҹҢҚ! Lawyers CHEF'S KISS рҹҳҳрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҚі: 'NO CORP ABOVE KID ACCOUNTABILITY вҖјпёҸ' вҖ“ next Cali federal SLAM in June рҹ“…вҡ–пёҸ! Zuck's 'right place over time' рҹҗҢрҹҳҙ? JURY said HOLD MY LAWSUIT рҹҚҶрҹ“ң and PAY UP DADDY рҹ’ёрҹ‘‘! Parents CELEBRATING рҹҘі like Kaley just MOONED the ALGORITHMS рҹҚ‘рҹҡҖ вҖ“ social media ADDICTION BUBBLE POPPED рҹ’Ҙрҹ«§, tech bros SWEATING рҹҳ°рҹ’Ұ!
